name: Didier Malherbe
description:
'''Didier Malherbe'''{{efn|Also known as "Bloomdido" or "Bloomdido bad de Grass"}} (born 22 January 1943) is a French musician and poet. He has played in several bands, including [[Gong (band)|Gong]] and Hadouk.

Malherbe plays the [[saxophone]], [[flute]], [[alto clarinet]], [[ocarina]], Laotian [[Khene|Khaen]], [[Bawu]] flute, [[Hulusi]], and other [[Wind instrument|wind instruments]]. Since 1995, the [[duduk]] has been one of his preferred instruments.
